title: begonia artior
intro: Begonia artior, also known as the Begonia plant, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Begoniaceae family. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Begonia artior include reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating digestive issues. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and poultices, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
